name: Parl, Hermit of Dark World
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>隠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> パアル
desc: If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: You can target 1 "Dark World" monster in your GY, except "Parl, Hermit of Dark World"; Special Summon it to either field, then, if this card was discarded from your hand to your GY by an opponent's card effect, you can Special Summon, to either field, 1 of your Fiend monsters that is banished, or in your hand or GY. You can only use this effect of "Parl, Hermit of Dark World" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: You can target 1 "Dark World" monster in your GY, except "Parl, Hermit of Dark World"; Special Summon it to either field, then, if this card was discarded from your hand to your GY by an opponent's card effect, you can Special Summon, to either field, 1 of your Fiend monsters that is banished, or in your hand or GY. You can only use this effect of "Parl, Hermit of Dark World" once per turn.
eff: If this card is discarded to the GY by card effect: You can target 1 "Dark World" monster in your GY, except "Parl, Hermit of Dark World"; Special Summon it to either field, then, if this card was discarded from your hand to your GY by an opponent's card effect, you can Special Summon, to either field, 1 of your Fiend monsters that is banished, or in your hand or GY. You can only use this effect of "Parl, Hermit of Dark World" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons from your Graveyard to your opponent's field
Special Summons from your banishment to the opponent's field
Special Summons from your hand to your opponent's field
